summary: Reservation Ingest Pipeline Testing Complete. Backend: 24/24 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All 5 tabs working (Ingest Pipeline, Lineage, Connections, Mappings, Reconciliation). Full 8-stage pipeline verified: duplicate detection, payload hash check, stale event detection, normalization, mapping resolution, decision engine, lineage update, reconciliation case creation.
critical_code_review_comments: pipeline.py: Clean 8-stage pipeline implementation with proper duplicate/stale/hash detection
normalizer.py: HotelRunner + Exely payload normalization with identity extraction
workers.py: 4 workers properly implemented - HR pull, Exely pull, ingest processor, replay (pull workers are MOCKED stubs)
unified_repository.py: All CRUD operations properly exclude _id, tenant isolation enforced
DataModelDashboard.jsx: New Ingest Pipeline tab with worker controls, raw events table, and processing stats badges
Loop prevention: external_write_protected=True for provider-originated reservations
seed_data_creation: Created test reservation events with prefixes HR-TEST-, HR-MOD-, HR-CXL-, HR-NEW-, HR-DUP-, HR-STALE-, HR-UPD-, HR-E2E-, EX-NEW- during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full ingest pipeline tested and working. All 8 stages verified: duplicate detection (same provider_event_id skipped), payload hash check, stale event detection (older version skipped), normalization (HotelRunner + Exely), mapping resolution, decision engine (create/update/cancel/skip/pending_mapping), lineage update with version tracking, reconciliation case creation. Pull workers are MOCKED - they log but don't fetch real provider data. Events enter via webhooks or inject-and-process endpoint.
mocked_apis_note: Pull workers (hotelrunner_pull_once, exely_pull_once) are stubs - they don't call real provider APIs. They log the pull window but don't fetch data. Real events enter via webhooks or the inject-and-process endpoint.

frontend_tests: Dashboard header 'Channel Manager v2.0 — 9 collections' - SUCCESS
Collection overview cards (raw_events:22, processed:17, pending:0/1, lineage:12, connections:2, recon_cases:6) - SUCCESS
Ingest Pipeline tab - Visible with worker controls - SUCCESS
Worker buttons: Process Pending, Replay Failed, HR Pull, Exely Pull - ALL VISIBLE & CLICKABLE
Raw Channel Events table - Shows 22 events with statuses (17 processed, 1 failed, 2 dup, 2 stale) - SUCCESS
Lineage tab - Shows 12 lineage records with version, decision, source_system fields - SUCCESS
Connections tab - HotelRunner (active), Exely (draft) with Activate/Delete buttons - SUCCESS
Mappings tab - 3 room mappings + 3 rate plan mappings with provider badges - SUCCESS
Reconciliation tab - Shows summary (6 open cases) with case details and Resolve buttons - SUCCESS

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/channel-manager/model/lineage - 200 OK (includes version, last_decision, source_system, external_write_protected)

pipeline_stages_verified.stage5_normalize: HotelRunner + Exely payloads normalized to canonical format
pipeline_stages_verified.stage6_mapping_resolution: Room and rate mappings resolved, missing mappings create cases
pipeline_stages_verified.stage8_lineage_update: Lineage created/updated with version tracking, external_write_protected=True
